ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "subregion" INTEGER /* Reference to the subregion */,
  "independence_year" INTEGER /* Year the country gained independence */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country for the latest year */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita for the latest year */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the country data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_subregion FOREIGN KEY ("subregion") REFERENCES subregions ("subregion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic level (e.g., High, Low, Lower-Middle, Upper-Middle) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic level */,
  "threshold_low_income" REAL /* Threshold value for low-income countries */,
  "threshold_lower_middle_income" REAL /* Threshold value for lower-middle-income countries */,
  "threshold_upper_middle_income" REAL /* Threshold value for upper-middle-income countries */,
  "threshold_high_income" REAL /* Threshold value for high-income countries */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the economic level thresholds were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "economic_level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic level */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) for the year */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita for the year */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country for the year */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate for the year */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the year */,
  "fiscal_deficit" REAL /* Fiscal deficit for the year */,
  "foreign_debt" REAL /* Total foreign debt for the year */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the economic data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_economic_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_economic_data_economic_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("economic_level_id") REFERENCES economic_levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the region data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subregions" (
  "subregion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subregion */,
  "subregion_name" TEXT /* Name of the subregion */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subregion */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Total area of the subregion in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the subregion */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the subregion data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subregion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subregions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the user data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was successful */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the access log was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES country_economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
